title: Simplistically Painful Reborn
description: cool little pvp type pack i made for java 1.20
body:
A pack that I made because there was a drought of green 1.20 PVP packs. Used Vanilla Tweaks and Microsoft Paint to make. Use if you really want to i dunno.
You can remix however you want, and if you will use in content, please credit me 🙏
There's also a 1.8 and 1.18 version vvvv

Older versions: [1.8 ver](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/simplistically-painful-1-8/), [1.18 ver](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/simplistically-painful-1-18/)
